data.body:
PLAN-REVIEW REMEDIATION (rounds 2-5) + claim. The gate's code-grounding initially grounded against origin/main (which lacks the LOCAL WS1-WS3 commits), producing false 'gates/code-review.yaml / CodeReviewBatchRunner doesn't exist' BLOCKs. Re-ran with --ref HEAD (attested at local HEAD 88ff113b, which contains WS3) -> VERDICT PASS, 0 blocking, signed. Legit BLOCKs remediated across rounds: shim translation contract (code_review_verdict->review_result field mapping via finalize_findings); diff-vs-ticket sidecar (emit on an explicit target_ticket only; diff-only returns the verdict); feature flag named ([code_review].enabled / REBAR_*); back-out one-way-door contradiction removed; thin-slice sequencing (4 slices); the __init__ shim's single_pass removal on retirement.

Residual 15 advisories baked into implementation: A6/A7 (workflow-failure degradation -> INDETERMINATE recovery, mirror produce_plan_review_verdict); A8/A13 (coverage fields + wire code_review_verdict into the schema registry like plan_review_verdict); A12 (sidecar idempotency via a run marker, best-effort); A1/A15 (finalize_findings produces a valid review_result; severity is the POST-Pass-3 severity on blocking/advisory findings); A2/A3/A4/A5 (shim/error-path detail). A9/A10/A11/A14 are AC-phrasing nits left intentionally.
